caption: A man wearing a white button-down shirt and dark trousers stands on a stage at an OpenStack Summit event. He is positioned to the left of a black podium and a large screen. The background features a blue wall with a classical building facade and the "openstack summit" logo. The screen displays technical specifications across different slides. Initial slides are titled "High Performance" and feature a blue graphic of a bird with a red sun, listing "1.4M IOPS," "8.9GB/s throughput," and "Concurrent access: max to 2.5M." Subsequent slides change to the title "Low Cost," detailing "Buy" and "Lease" options and stating "Unit price is 1/3 of AWS," accompanied by a comparison table between "AWS" and "SurCloud Appliance." Throughout the sequence, the man stands and gestures while presenting the information on the screen.
